title: Grammys 2026 Song of the Year Winner: Final Predictions & Betting Odds Revealed
text:
2026 Grammys Song of the Year: Nominees and Betting Overview

The article lists eight Song of the Year nominees for the February 1, 2026 Grammy Awards ceremony:

1. Lady Gaga - "Abracadabra"
2. Doechii - "Anxiety"
3. Rosé and Bruno Mars - "APT."
4. Bad Bunny - "DtMF"
5. HUNTR/X (EJAE, Audrey Nuna, Rei Ami) - "Golden"
6. Kendrick Lamar featuring SZA - "Luther"
7. Sabrina Carpenter - "Mancheld"
8. Billie Eilish - "Wildflower"

Betting Information:

The article references prediction market Polymarket, noting that "hundreds of thousands of dollars are pouring in" for Song of the Year predictions. However, the specific odds and final predictions are not included in the provided content—readers must click through to view the detailed betting data.
